behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, literal strings (last(this.stores.matchesId.state), this.stores.lastMatchId.state, const _options = Vue.computed, ..._options.value, router.buildLocation(options as any), router.stores.lastMatchRouteFullPath) are explicitly mentioned in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction.md dictates the exact replacement strings: 'should contain last(this.stores.matchesId.state)', 'should contain router.buildLocation(options as any)', and explicitly lists which lines to remove — leaving almost no reasoning about what to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact literal strings like 'router.buildLocation(options as any)' and 'last(this.stores.matchesId.state)'; alternative valid refactors (e.g., using a different cast or variable binding) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include subprocess executions of builds, type checks, unit tests, and lint via pnpm nx run commands, not just string matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify specific code changes and require real builds/tests to pass; stub implementation cannot satisfy the build/unit-test checks.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All expected outcomes listed in instruction.md (store removals, import removals, string replacements, SSR call shape) are covered by corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under 'Structural Tests' and 'Repo CI/CD Tests' section comments with descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code refactor; no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and commands appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names exact files, exact lines to remove ('const _options = Vue.computed', '..._options.value'), and exact replacement string — this is heavy localization/fix leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
